name: Pesto Sauce, Winter Style
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and cut the garlic cloves.
2. Rinse the parsley and remove the stems.
3. Shake dry any remaining moisture from the parsley.
4. Add all ingredients to a blender in the order specified.
5. Blend on high until the sauce is smooth.
6. Refrigerate, covered, until ready to use.
Notes:
You will need extra grated Parmesan cheese for sprinkling over pasta or before serving. Leftover sauce can be stored and used later to flavor soups, broiled meat or fish, or as a spread on toasted French bread.
